title: New Labor Reforms: Empowering Workers or Hurting Corporate Growth?
bias_explanation: The article focuses heavily on corporate exploitation and workers' rights, viewing the policy changes through a labor-first lens.

title: Market Rally: Government Policies Fuel Unprecedented Industrial Growth
bias_explanation: The piece adopts an optimistic tone regarding government deregulation, praising market-friendly reforms while downplaying potential wage inequality.

title: Government Announces New Educational Policy to Be Implemented Next Month
bias_explanation: A purely descriptive, objective report detailing the key facts, implementation timeline, and statements from both officials and critics.

title: Welfare Scheme Fails to Reach Remote Villages in Tribal Belts
bias_explanation: Emphasizes systemic failures, government neglect, and the plight of marginalized communities without giving significant weight to bureaucratic bottlenecks.

title: Bold Tax Reforms Unleash Entrepreneurial Wave Across India's Metros
bias_explanation: Frames tax reductions as a major triumph of the current administration, linking them directly to job creation and entrepreneurship.

title: Supreme Court Asks Center for Detailed Report on Forest Land Evictions
bias_explanation: Focuses strictly on court proceedings, quoting the judges and the government's legal representatives verbatim.

title: CRISIS! Inflation Crushes Middle Class While Corporates Get Tax Breaks
bias_explanation: High sensationalism with loaded emotional language, attributing inflation solely to corporate greed and government collusion.

title: Historic Cultural Center Inaugurated; Restoration of National Heritage Complete
bias_explanation: Frames the restoration project in strongly nationalist terms, highlighting cultural pride while ignoring architectural criticism or budget concerns.

title: Monsoon Rainfall Reaches Normal Levels Across Central India, Says IMD
bias_explanation: Presents meteorological data directly from the official weather agency without editorial slant.

title: Protests Erupt in Capital Over Controversial Environment Clearance Bill
bias_explanation: Focuses primarily on environmental activists and tribal communities protesting, framing the bill as pro-corporate at the cost of ecology.

title: National Security Tightened Along Border Following High-Level Defense Meeting
bias_explanation: Supportive of the military's preparedness and the government's strategic decisions, emphasizing strong national security.

title: Reserve Bank of India Keeps Repo Rate Unchanged at 6.5%
bias_explanation: Objective financial reporting detailing the central bank's decision, policy stance, and subsequent market reactions.

title: Privatization of Public Sector Banks is a Recipe for Economic Disaster
bias_explanation: Criticizes the privatization move using negative adjectives, arguing it will lead to financial instability and exclude rural savers.

title: New Digital India Initiative Speeds Up Passport Approvals
bias_explanation: Highlights the efficiency gains and administrative success of a government-led digitisation project.

title: Health Ministry Issues Advisory on Rising Dengue Cases in Southern States
bias_explanation: Reports on government-issued health guidelines, statistics, and preventive measures in a neutral, informative tone.
